title: German-Style Corn Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional pancakes, made with corn flour and a hint of German flavor. Enjoy these fluffy and delicious pancakes as a sweet breakfast or brunch option.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together corn flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, eggs, and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings, such as maple syrup or fresh fruit.
